title: verbascum × skamneliense
intro: Verbascum × skamneliense, also known as Skamn's mullein, is a hybrid species of mullein, a flowering plant in the figwort family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × skamneliense include soothing sore throats, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
